pokemon:cherubi.name: Cherubi
pokemon:cherubi.summary: It evolves by sucking the energy out of the small ball where it had been storing nutrients.
expansionNotes: Competitive, encounter, and media coverage can be expanded later without changing the page contract.

pokedexEntries.text: It evolves by sucking the energy out of the small ball where it had been storing nutrients.
The small ball is not only filled with nutrients, it is also tasty. Starly try to peck it off.
The small ball is not only filled with nutrients, it is also tasty. Starly try to peck it off.
The small ball holds the nutrients needed for evolution. Apparently, it is very sweet and tasty.
It evolves by sucking the energy out of the small ball where it had been storing nutrients.
Once the fruit growing alongside the main body is large and plump, Cherubi will use the nutrients within to evolve. The fruit then detaches, becoming nourishment for other creatures.
Sunlight colors it red. When the small ball is drained of nutrients, it shrivels to herald evolution.
Sunlight colors it red. When the small ball is drained of nutrients, it shrivels to herald evolution.
The small ball is not only filled with nutrients, it is also tasty. STARLY try to peck it off.
The deeper a Cherubi’s red, the more nutrients it has stockpiled in its body. And the sweeter and tastier its small ball!
It evolves by sucking the energy out of the small ball where it had been storing nutrients.
It nimbly dashes about to avoid getting pecked by bird Pokémon that would love to make off with its small, nutrient-rich storage ball.
The small ball is not only filled with nutrients, it is also tasty. Starly try to peck it off.
The small ball is not only filled with nutrients, it is also tasty. Starly try to peck it off.
Sunlight colors it red. When the small ball is drained of nutrients, it shrivels to herald evolution.
It evolves by sucking the energy out of the small ball where it had been storing nutrients.

competitiveSummary: Competitive notes are pending a richer source import.
loreSummary: It evolves by sucking the energy out of the small ball where it had been storing nutrients.

pokemon:cherrim.name: Cherrim
pokemon:cherrim.summary: If it senses strong sunlight, it opens its folded petals to absorb the sun’s rays with its whole body.
expansionNotes: Competitive, encounter, and media coverage can be expanded later without changing the page contract.

pokedexEntries.text: If it senses strong sunlight, it opens its folded petals to absorb the sun’s rays with its whole body.
If it senses strong sunlight, it opens its folded petals to absorb the sun’s rays with its whole body.
If it senses strong sunlight, it opens its folded petals to absorb the sun’s rays with its whole body.
It blooms during times of strong sunlight. It tries to make up for everything it endured as a bud.
During times of strong sunlight, its bud blooms, its petals open fully, and it becomes very active.
Motionless, save for the occasional quiver. A rich array of Pokémon can be found gathered around it, drawn by the scent exuded from Cherrim's folded petals.
During times of strong sunlight, its bud blooms, its petals open fully, and it becomes very active.
It is docile as a bud, but turns cheerful when it blooms. It folds back into a bud if sunlight wanes.
If it senses strong sunlight, it opens its folded petals to absorb the sun’s rays with its whole body.
Its folded petals are pretty tough. Bird Pokémon can peck at them all they want, and Cherrim won’t be bothered at all.
During times of strong sunlight, its bud blooms, its petals open fully, and it becomes very active.
As a bud, it barely moves. It sits still, placidly waiting for sunlight to appear.
If it senses strong sunlight, it opens its folded petals to absorb the sun’s rays with its whole body.
If it senses strong sunlight, it opens its folded petals to absorb the sun’s rays with its whole body.
During times of strong sunlight, its bud blooms, its petals open fully, and it becomes very active.
If it senses strong sunlight, it opens its folded petals to absorb the sun’s rays with its whole body.

loreSummary: If it senses strong sunlight, it opens its folded petals to absorb the sun’s rays with its whole body.
